title: IAM, Bucket Policies, Ownership, Access Points, and Public Access · Runtime Contract: Policy Simulation Negative Tests

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Predict Policy Simulation Negative Tests · Theory Policy Simulation Negative…
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go file-delivery team handles case 9566 during a cost-anomaly investigation. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove explicit-deny-aware least privilege, public block, ownership, and tenant scope; record cleanup, rollback, restoration, and residual-risk ownership; then double concurrent transfers and keep process resource limits intact. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
